# Issue #9581 Windows desktop CUA evidence

Generated by `bun run --cwd plugins/plugin-computeruse capture:windows-desktop-evidence` at 2026-06-30T22:32:04.873Z.

- Status: `passed`
- Machine: `QEMU Standard PC (Q35 + ICH9, 2009)`
- Windows: `Microsoft Windows 11 Pro 10.0.26200 (build 26200)`
- Git: `299a37df29`

The input proof is **non-disruptive**: it drives a freshly-launched, controlled
Notepad window (not the user's apps) and terminates it when done.

Additional input-effect recording generated by
`bun run --cwd plugins/plugin-computeruse record:windows-cua-input` at
2026-06-30T22:33:22.698Z. That recording drives a generated Windows Forms text
target, progressively pastes the marker with real `Ctrl+V` keyboard input,
saves with `Ctrl+S`, and verifies the marker from
`input-recording/windows-cua-input-target.txt`.
